mapper.sql: o.id, o.order_no, o.appointment_id, o.user_id, o.amount, o.status, o.payment_method, o.pay_time, o.create_time, o.update_time, a.appointment_no, a.patient_name, d.doctor_name, dp.name as department_name
mapper.select:
select from payment_order o left join appointment_record a on o.appointment_id = a.id left join doctor_info d on a.doctor_id = d.id left join department_info dp on a.department_id = dp.id
and (o.order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.appointment_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.patient_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and o.status = #{status}
order by o.id desc

select from payment_order o left join appointment_record a on o.appointment_id = a.id left join doctor_info d on a.doctor_id = d.id left join department_info dp on a.department_id = dp.id where o.id = #{id}

select from payment_order o left join appointment_record a on o.appointment_id = a.id left join doctor_info d on a.doctor_id = d.id left join department_info dp on a.department_id = dp.id where o.appointment_id = #{appointmentId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into payment_order(order_no, appointment_id, user_id, amount, status, payment_method, pay_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{appointmentId}, #{userId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{paymentMethod}, #{payTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update payment_order set status = #{status}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, pay_time = #{payTime}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update payment_order set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from payment_order where status = 1
